scripts.build:js: npx terser assets/js/mediumish.js -o assets/js/mediumish.min.js -c -m && npx terser assets/js/tools-utils.js -o assets/js/tools-utils.min.js -c -m
scripts.lint: npm run lint:css && npm run lint:js && npm run lint:md && npm run lint:html && npm run format:check
scripts.audit:build-css: mkdir -p .audit && for f in assets/css/*.scss; do tail -n +3 "$f" > ".audit/$(basename "$f")"; done && npx sass .audit/main.scss .audit/main.css --load-path=_sass --no-source-map --style=expanded --quiet-deps 2>/dev/null && npx sass .audit/tools.scss .audit/tools.css --load-path=_sass --no-source-map --style=expanded --quiet-deps 2>/dev/null && npx sass .audit/about.scss .audit/about.css --load-path=_sass --no-source-map --style=expanded --quiet-deps 2>/dev/null
